hotel_name: Gia Hưng Apartment Mường Thanh resort apartment right next to My Khe beach Đà Nẵng (Gia Hung Apartment Muong Thanh resort apartment right next to My Khe beach Đa Nang)

reviews.title: Waste of time and effort!
reviews.text: Sent me a confirmation, then 40 minutes later I received a sorry, not available, and this was after I arrived at the building with luggage in hand. Hours later, the room was still listed as available. What can I say except be careful when reserving apartments. Certainly not professional in my book.

reviews.title: Rất tuyệt vời tôi sẽ quay lại chỗ nghỉ dưỡng nhà Gia Hưng cảm ơn sự đô
reviews.positives: Ngay sát bãi biển,rất thuận tiện,nhiều dịch vụ tiện ích ,Hằng là chủ căn hộ cô ấy đón tiếp tôi rất nhiệt tình,nhân viên thân thiện,tôi sẽ quay lại ,,cảm ơn chủ căn hộ

reviews.title: Gia đình tôi sẽ quay trở lại đây 1 lần nữa. Không gian ở đây rất tuyệt
reviews.positives: Pv dẫn đến tận phòng và phòng sạch sẽ thoáng mát yên tĩnh

reviews.title: Awful experience
reviews.negatives: The owner did not informed me beforehand that she did not accept the price offered by booking.com to me. Instead, she only refused to let me stay when I check in with the price offered by Booking.com and she alleged the reason that such price is too low. In short, Booking.com and the owner did bring vicious experience to me.

reviews.title: Overall good but could be much better
reviews.positives: The location was excellent. Access to beach. Apartment balcony overlooked beach & City. Beds and linens were clean.
reviews.negatives: It wasnt the apartment advertised. Couch was horribly uncomfortable. It was filthy everywhere you didnt see ie. down side of bed it was caked with dirt and a used condom wrapper. Elevator is a nightmare during the day. Bathroom doors needed to stay closed for sewerage smell
